problem.title: Rotate Image
problem.description: You are given an n x n 2D matrix representing an image, rotate the image by 90 degrees (clockwise).

example.explanation: Rotate 90° clockwise in-place: transpose then reverse each row.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Transpose and Reverse [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: A 90-degree clockwise rotation can be decomposed into two simpler operations: first transpose the matrix (swap matrix[i][j] with matrix[j][i] for all i < j), then reverse each row. Both operations are in-place and together produce the correct rotation without any extra space.
